Name: Convex - Run Function
Description: Invokes a Convex mutation, action, or query against a deployment using the [Convex CLI](https://docs.convex.dev/cli). Ideal for running post-deploy data migrations, seeding initial data, or executing smoke-test queries as part of a deployment pipeline.

Properties.Octopus.Action.Script.ScriptBody:
deployKey=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.DeployKey")
functionPath=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.FunctionPath")
functionArgs=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.FunctionArgs")
deploymentType=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.DeploymentType")
previewName=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.PreviewName")
workingDir=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.WorkingDirectory")
cmdTimeout=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexRun.CommandTimeout")

if [ -z "$deployKey" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: ConvexRun.DeployKey is required."
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$functionPath" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: ConvexRun.FunctionPath is required."
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$deploymentType" ]; then
  deploymentType="prod"
fi

if [ -z "$cmdTimeout" ]; then
  cmdTimeout="120"
fi

export CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY="$deployKey"

if [ -n "$workingDir" ]; then
  echo "Changing to working directory: $workingDir"
  cd "$workingDir" || { echo "ERROR: Could not change to directory '$workingDir'"; exit 1; }
fi

deploymentFlag=""
case "$deploymentType" in
  prod)
    deploymentFlag="--prod"
    ;;
  preview)
    if [ -z "$previewName" ]; then
      echo "ERROR: ConvexRun.PreviewName is required when deployment type is 'preview'."
      exit 1
    fi
    deploymentFlag="--preview-name $previewName"
    ;;
  dev)
    deploymentFlag=""
    ;;
esac

ensure_node() {
  if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then
    echo "Node.js found: $(node --version)"
    return 0
  fi
  export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"
  if [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then
    \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
    if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then
      echo "Node.js loaded via nvm: $(node --version)"
      return 0
    fi
  fi
  echo "Node.js not found. Installing via nvm..."
  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash
  \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
  nvm install --lts
  echo "Node.js installed: $(node --version)"
}
ensure_node

echo "Running Convex function: $functionPath"
echo "Deployment type: $deploymentType"

if [ -n "$functionArgs" ]; then
  echo "Args: $functionArgs"
  timeout "$cmdTimeout" npx convex run $deploymentFlag "$functionPath" "$functionArgs"
else
  timeout "$cmdTimeout" npx convex run $deploymentFlag "$functionPath"
fi

exitCode=$?
if [ $exitCode -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Convex function '$functionPath' failed with exit code $exitCode."
  exit $exitCode
fi

echo "Convex function '$functionPath' completed successfully."

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.DeployKey
Parameters.Label: Deploy Key
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deploy key for the target project. Store this as a sensitive Octopus variable.

See: [Creating deploy keys](https://docs.convex.dev/cli#deploy-keys)

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.FunctionPath
Parameters.Label: Function Path
Parameters.HelpText:
The path to the Convex function to invoke, in the format `module:functionName`.

Examples:
- `migrations:runV2`
- `seed:populateDefaults`
- `healthcheck:ping`

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.FunctionArgs
Parameters.Label: Function Arguments (JSON)
Parameters.HelpText:
Optional. A JSON object of arguments to pass to the function.

Example: `{"dryRun": false, "batchSize": 100}`

Leave blank if the function takes no arguments.

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.DeploymentType
Parameters.Label: Deployment Type
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deployment to target.

- `prod` — production deployment (default)
- `preview` — preview deployment (requires a preview name)
- `dev` — development deployment

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.PreviewName
Parameters.Label: Preview Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the preview deployment. Only required when **Deployment Type** is `preview`.

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.WorkingDirectory
Parameters.Label: Working Directory
Parameters.HelpText: Optional. Path to the directory containing your Convex project. Defaults to the current working directory if left blank.

Parameters.Name: ConvexRun.CommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command Timeout (seconds)
Parameters.HelpText: Maximum number of seconds to wait for the function to complete. Defaults to 120.
